//: AI Controller Settings — Edit this file to swap models without code changes.
Reloaded on server restart. Changes take effect immediately for new requests.
//_mode: cli_only | hybrid | http_only. Use 'cli_only' to disable all HTTP API calls (OpenRouter, etc.)

roles.//: Each role maps to a CLI model. CLI models use Gemini CLI, Qwen CLI, or Codex CLI.
roles.//_TEST_GENERATION: Gemini CLI → generates test scenarios and test cases (JSON spec)
roles.//_CODE: Qwen CLI → writes Playwright TypeScript scripts from JSON spec
roles.//_INVESTIGATOR: Gemini CLI → self-healing diagnostics and failure analysis

fallback.//: When the primary model for a role fails, try these models in order.
Leave empty [] to disable fallback (fail fast).
fallback.//_httpFallback: When all CLI models fail, use OpenRouter HTTP API as last resort

timeouts.//: Timeouts in milliseconds for each CLI model.

circuitBreaker.//: Stop trying a model after N consecutive failures. Auto-recover after M seconds.
